nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Refactor flat basic auth properties into a nested static class for better structure.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Replaced `basicAuthUsername`, `basicAuthPassword`, and `ignorePath` fields with a `BasicAuthConfig` inner class instance.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Add a derived boolean property to check if basic auth is enabled based on the presence of the config object.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Added `isEnableBasicAuth()` method returning `Objects.nonNull(basicAuth)` and annotated it with `@JsonIgnore`.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Add Jackson annotations to control JSON serialization behavior for the properties class.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Added `@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)` and `@JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_NULL)` to the class.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Remove Spring-specific component and configuration property annotations from the class.
Add a new field to store the server URL as a java.net.URL object.
Remove fields related to music and lyric file directories that are no longer used in this configuration.
Add a private constructor throwing UnsupportedOperationException to prevent instantiation of the utility class.
Replace the deprecated @date Javadoc tag with the standard @since tag.
Refactor try-with-resources to use the Java 9+ syntax where resources are declared outside the try block.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Introduce a boolean flag to allow disabling the automatic 304 Not Modified response logic.
Provide a fluent API method to disable the 304 status return behavior.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: public MultipartFileSender no304CodeReturn() { enable304StatusReturn = false; return this; }

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Wrap the existing 304 Not Modified and precondition check logic in a conditional block based on the new flag.
Replace hardcoded HTTP header string literals with constants from HttpHeaders for better maintainability.
Replace the hardcoded 'application/octet-stream' string with the MediaType constant.
Change the Javadoc @date tag to @since to follow standard JavaDoc conventions.
Replace the traditional class with a Java record to leverage concise syntax and built-in value-based semantics.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: public record Tuple2<T1, T2>(T1 t1, T2 t2) {}

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Change the Javadoc date annotation from @date to @since to follow standard Java documentation conventions.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Add explicit null check for Integer parameter to prevent NullPointerException during enum iteration.
Add a new 'ext' field to the enum to store file extensions alongside media types.
Update enum constant definitions to include the new extension string.
Change method parameter from primitive int to wrapper Integer to support null values.
Replace deprecated @date tag with standard @since tag in Javadoc.
Replace javax.servlet and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Rename the @date Javadoc tag to @since for better semantic clarity and standard compliance.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Remove Pageable parameters from search endpoints to return full result lists instead of paginated results.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Add a new search endpoint (search_v2) that utilizes a dedicated SearchService and converts results to a new DTO format.
Inject SearchService and multiple DataSourceWrapper maps into the controller to support new search and data source functionalities.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Add a test endpoint to verify Tencent COS data source integration and populate music URIs.
Add an endpoint to trigger re-initialization of the lyric search index.
Use Stream.toList() instead of collecting to a list, leveraging Java 16+ features.
Update Javadoc tag from @date to @since for better semantic clarity.
Add import for the new MusicManageDTO class to support the new conversion method.
Replace the deprecated @date Javadoc tag with the standard @since tag.
Add a new MapStruct mapping method to convert Music entity to MusicManageDTO.
Add URI fields for music, lyric, and cover resources to the DTO to support structured URL handling.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace the non-standard @date Javadoc tag with the standard @since tag.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency to support string utility methods.
Add Spring Framework dependency to support collection utility methods.
Add a File field to the CoverPicture inner class to store file references.
Exclude base64 and binaryData fields from the generated toString method to prevent large output.
Add a helper method to determine if the music metadata has been modified.
Remove JPA annotations to migrate from Hibernate/JPA persistence to a non-annotated entity model (likely switching to MyBatis or similar).
Change the 'type' field from primitive int to Integer to allow null values, aligning with the removal of JPA nullable constraints.
